name: Tempeh and Vegetable Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 cup White or blue dried corn kernels
1 medium Red bell pepper, seeded and finely chopped
1 medium Green bell pepper, seeded and finely chopped
4 large Tomatoes, peeled and stewed, then broken apart
2 tablespoons Chili powder or paste from 2-3 chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans and corn overnight, then cook until done.
2. Cut the tempeh into small cubes and brown with the onions in oil (alternately you can grate the tempeh).
3. Add bell peppers and garlic and sauté for 5 to 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the tomatoes, beans, corn, and herbs and spices.
5. Add water or tomato juice. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for an hour, stirring often to prevent sticking and burning.
7. Serve with lime wedges squeezed over each serving or with grated vegan cheese.
